headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) After A 43% One-Year Rally?
summary: Some investors are asking whether Expeditors International of Washington, at around US$158 a share, still offers value or whether most of the opportunity is already reflected in the price. The stock has returned 1.9% over the past week, 6.8% over the past month, 4.4% year to date and 42.6% over the last year, which naturally has investors considering both growth potential and changing risk perceptions. Recent coverage around Expeditors has focused on its role as a global logistics provider...
